title: potentilla glandulifera var. virescens
intro: Potentilla glandulifera var. virescens, also known as the glandular potentilla, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of China and India. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Potentilla glandulifera var. virescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate diarrhea, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, poultices, and topical creams for various health applications.
